target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Building appears structurally intact; roof, walls, and windows show no visible signs of damage or deformation; no debris or structural failure evident.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: Building appears intact with no visible structural damage, missing components, or collapsed sections; windows and roof are undamaged; no signs of impact or destruction.

summary: Two buildings assessed show NO DAMAGE with CONFIRMED confidence; both appear structurally intact with undamaged roofs, walls, and windows. The overall scene depicts a well-maintained urban area with a large institutional building and surrounding residential structures, all appearing undamaged and functional. Given the confirmed NO DAMAGE status of the assessed buildings, there is no evidence of functional impairment or disruption to operations.
